spells.name: Mind Blast
spells.notes: Interruptible filler (kicked in logs). Measured TANK-ONLY (tank_buster) with max ~673k -> is_lethal: a big tank nuke if it lands, which is why it's the priority kick.

spells.name: Repulse
spells.notes: From a Casts CSV; 1263528 'Repulse' (2.00s). Tooltip: 'unleashes a repulsing force that knocks ALL players back' = a PARTY-WIDE knockback (scripted, so DB2 geometry reads speed 0; displacement + is_aoe hand-set, user-confirmed). Distinct from the scrape's 'Repulsing Force' 1263533.

spells.name: Collapsing Void
spells.notes: From a Casts CSV; 1263529 = the only 9.00s 'Collapsing Void' (self-buff channel, Buffs CSV).

spells.name: Void Storm
spells.notes: From a Casts CSV; 1263532 (Viceroy's 1263xxx block) over the scrape's mis-attributed 1265030. Instant, targeted.

spells.name: Umbral Tentacles
spells.notes: From a Casts CSV; 1263538 = the only 3.00s 'Umbral Tentacles' (Viceroy's 1263xxx block).

spells.name: Mass Void Infusion
spells.notes: From a Casts CSV (WCL rate-limited); 1263542 unique in DB2. Added under 122056 (the M+/log boss id); the scrape mis-filed Viceroy's Midnight kit under 124309 + stale Legion casts under 122056.

spells.coaching_note: Afflicts players with a Shadow vulnerability — +20% Shadow damage taken. Dispel it (Magic) before the next big Shadow hit lands amplified.

spells.name: Leeching Void
spells.notes: bootstrapped from log: Merciless Subjugator :: Leeching Void (n=5)

spells.coaching_note: A chain-snare on a player that also pulses Shadow damage to anyone within 4 yds (40% snare) — pre-spread off the chained player; the snare clears with Blessing of Freedom or any movement-freeing ability.
spells.name: Chains of Subjugation
spells.notes: Merciless Subjugator :: Chains of Subjugation — the SNARE variant (DB2 mechanic 11=snared). The bootstrap had mis-picked 1277343 (a no-mechanic variant) by the newest-id heuristic; repointed to 1262509 so the engine sees it as a root/snare (movement-freedom dimension).

spells.coaching_note: L'ura opens void rifts; every 3rd cycle she fires a lance from each at her current target — a tank-buster that scales with the number of rifts. Tank actives/externals; the more rifts open, the bigger the hit.
